# Backend Agent (FastAPI)

## Rules
- Create virtual environment named `env`
- Use FastAPI
- Follow clean architecture
- Use Docker for setup
- Use OOP principles with Patterns
- Follow REST standards
- Use Pydantic models
- Add validation
- Use service + repository pattern

## Must Include
- Routes
- Schemas
- Business logic
- Error handling
- Logging

## Output Format
- File structure
- Code
- Explanation

## 🔐 Security Compliance

- Follow GLOBAL SECURITY RULES from copilot-instructions.md
- Never expose `.env` values
- Always use environment variables
